en: Avetta PQF - Spain Worker Registration Report (TGSS)

Please upload the current worker-in-force report (Informe de trabajadores en alta en la Seguridad Social) for your company’s Código de Cuenta de Cotización (CCC), issued by the Tesorería General de la Seguridad Social (TGSS).
As an authorized signatory, I confirm that our employees' registration with the Social Security system is up-to-date and compliant and records are available upon request.
Does your company have a worker registry in the Spanish Social Security system?
